title: Home, Sweet Home Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A building where people live, with walls and a roof.
rounds.explanation: house: A building where people live, with walls and a roof.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A room with a sink and a toilet for washing.
rounds.explanation: bathroom: A room with a sink and a toilet for washing.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: An opening in a wall with glass to let in light.
rounds.explanation: window: An opening in a wall with glass to let in light.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A set of rooms to live in inside a bigger building.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A long, soft seat for two or three people.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: My family lives in a house with a garden.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The bees make honey in their hive.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: We drink tea together in the living room.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: An opening in the ground where some animals live.
rounds.explanation: hole: An opening in the ground where some animals live. The rabbit ran into its hole.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'bedroom'?
rounds.explanation: bedroom: A room where people sleep. I keep my bed and toys in my bedroom.

rounds.prompt: My mother is cooking rice in the ____.
rounds.explanation: kitchen: A room where food is cooked. My mother is cooking rice in the kitchen.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'hut'?
rounds.explanation: In the village, some people live in a hut made of mud and straw.

rounds.prompt: The children climb a ladder to their ____.
rounds.explanation: The children climb a ladder to their tree house.

rounds.prompt: Which spelling is correct?
rounds.explanation: The bird made a nest in the tall tree.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1 — Describe a Kind of Home
Speaking Game — My Home Tour
Speaking 5 - Where Does It Belong?
rounds.target: Describe the position of six household objects for a partner to identify.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Every morning I make my bed.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: After we eat, I wash the dishes.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'dining room' mean in this unit?
choices: A room where people eat their meals.
A building where people live, with walls and a roof.
A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.
rounds.answer: A room where people eat their meals.
rounds.explanation: dining room: A room where people eat their meals.

rounds.prompt: What does 'sweep the floor' mean in this unit?
choices: A building where people live, with walls and a roof.
A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.
To clean the floor with a broom.
rounds.answer: To clean the floor with a broom.
rounds.explanation: sweep the floor: To clean the floor with a broom.

rounds.prompt: What does 'hut' mean in this unit?
choices: A home a bird builds to lay its eggs.
A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.
A building where people live, with walls and a roof.
rounds.answer: A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.
rounds.explanation: hut: A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'sink'?
rounds.explanation: sink is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'stilt house'?
rounds.explanation: stilt house is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'bedroom'?
rounds.explanation: bedroom is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.
A room where food is cooked.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A room where people eat their meals.
A soft mat that covers part of the floor.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: To put things back in their place.
To clean the plates and cups in the sink.
A home dug into rock in a cliff.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: The children climb a ladder to their ____.
rounds.explanation: The children climb a ladder to their tree house.

rounds.prompt: Which spelling is correct?
rounds.explanation: The bird made a nest in the tall tree.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A home for bees.
rounds.explanation: hive: A home for bees. The bees make honey in their hive.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'house' mean?
choices: A building where people live, with walls and a roof.
A set of rooms to live in inside a bigger building.
A small, simple house with only one or two rooms.
A small house built up in the branches of a tree.
rounds.answer: A building where people live, with walls and a roof.
rounds.explanation: My family lives in a house with a garden.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A set of rooms to live in inside a bigger building.
rounds.explanation: In the city, many people live in an apartment.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'hut'?
rounds.explanation: In the village, some people live in a hut made of mud and straw.
